CustomField.formula: trim(Product_Line_Code__r.Name) + trim(Brand_Code__r.BrandCode__c) + trim(UPC__c) + trim(text(Taste__c))+ trim(text(Length__c)) + trim(text(Packaging__c)) + trim(text(Flavor__c)) + trim(text(Filter__c)) + trim(text(PaperType__c)) + trim(text(Cut__c))
CustomField.label: Duplicate Brand Hierarchy
